title: Tetanus - Canada.ca
content:
### How is tetanus diagnosed? What is the treatment?
There are no tests to confirm tetanus. Health professionals diagnose the disease by looking at the symptoms.
In the past, tetanus was nearly always fatal. There is still no cure for the infection itself, but treatment in hospital can control the symptoms. Vaccination helps your immune system to recognize the bacteria and fight off the disease.
Treatment usually involves:
- tetanus vaccine, and
- sedatives to control muscle spasms.
If the infection is severe, patients may be hooked up to a breathing machine (ventilator) to help their lungs.
